title: load_extra_css reads custom CSS file from disk on every page request
description: activitypub.rs load_extra_css reads theme_tokens_path and custom_css_path from the filesystem on every HTML page render (index, profile, post). For a server under load, this means filesystem I/O on every request for static content that only changes when the admin edits it. Cache the result in AppState or behind a once_cell/watch channel that reloads on SIGHUP.
